name: sse-provisioning-stream
description: SSE pattern for onboard progress: api/routes/events.js polls job_events table every 500ms, sends terminal job_done event when status=done|failed. UI uses EventSource with withCredentials=true, retries on disconnect. Replaces 3s setInterval polling loop.

name: onboard-api-spawn
description: POST /api/onboard/start spawns node cli/bin/diffract.js onboard --non-interactive with env vars (DIFFRACTION_JOB_ID, DIFFRACTION_PROVIDER, DIFFRACTION_MODEL, DIFFRACTION_SANDBOX_NAME, DIFFRACTION_POLICY_MODE, DIFFRACTION_POLICY_PRESETS, NVIDIA_API_KEY). No new CLI flags needed — onboard.js already reads all values from env.

content: api/lib/credentials.js is ESM duplicate of cli/bin/lib/credentials.js — do NOT require() the CJS module from ESM. Writes ~/.diffract/credentials.json with mode 0600, dir 0700. saveCredential/getCredential/loadCredentials exported.

API spawn PATH fix: api/routes/onboard.js sets PATH=/root/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:${process.env.PATH} in spawn env so child process finds openshell (lives at /root/.local/bin/openshell). Non-login SSH shells on Hostinger VPS have no PATH for diffract tooling — see mx-80a222.
